headline: X-Energy Breaks Out of Post-IPO Slump. Why Analysts Say the Nuclear Stock Can Surge.
summary: Nuclear reactor developer  X-Energy’s  stock has been in a lull since the company’s highly successful initial public offering last month, but investors should focus on the long-term potential rather than day-to-day trading, analysts say.  A host of investment banks initiated coverage of  X-Energy  on Tuesday as the quiet period on firms involved in its IPO lifted.  As is often the case with IPO underwriters, most opinions were positive.

headline: 3 Stocks Backed By Broker Rating Upgrades Worth Betting On
summary: Broker upgrades spotlight Dow, Arrow Electronics and Lumentum as U.S. stocks reflect resilience amid oil, Middle East and tariff risks and inflation concerns.
